sql: SELECT bounce_type, COUNT(*) as bounce_count, ROUND(COUNT(*)::numeric / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customerio_data.bounces) * 100, 2) as percentage FROM customerio_data.bounces GROUP BY bounce_type ORDER BY bounce_count DESC
question: What types of email bounces are we seeing and how common is each?

sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', timestamp) as day, COUNT(*) as daily_bounces FROM customerio_data.bounces WHERE timestamp >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
question: Show me our daily email bounce trend for the last month

sql: SELECT reason, COUNT(*) as occurrences FROM customerio_data.bounces WHERE timestamp >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '90 days' GROUP BY reason ORDER BY occurrences DESC LIMIT 10
question: What are the main reasons emails are bouncing?

sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', timestamp) as week, COUNT(*) as bounces, SUM(CASE WHEN bounce_type = 'hard' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hard_bounces FROM customerio_data.bounces WHERE timestamp >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '8 weeks' GROUP BY week ORDER BY week
question: Show me weekly bounce trends including hard bounces

sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as hard_bounces FROM customerio_data.bounces WHERE bounce_type = 'hard' AND timestamp >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days'
question: How many hard bounces have we had in the last 30 days?

sql: SELECT bounce_type, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (TIMESTAMP '2024-12-31 23:59:59' - timestamp)) / 86400) as avg_days_ago FROM customerio_data.bounces GROUP BY bounce_type
question: How recent are our email bounces by type?

sql: SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) as hour, COUNT(*) as bounce_count FROM customerio_data.bounces WHERE timestamp >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour
question: What time of day do emails typically bounce?

sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', timestamp) as month, COUNT(*) as bounces FROM customerio_data.bounces WHERE timestamp >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '6 months' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
question: What's our monthly email bounce trend?

sql: SELECT bounce_type, COUNT(DISTINCT delivery_id) as unique_deliveries FROM customerio_data.bounces GROUP BY bounce_type
question: How many unique emails bounced by bounce type?

sql: SELECT reason FROM customerio_data.bounces WHERE bounce_type = 'hard' GROUP BY reason ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 5
question: What are the top reasons for hard bounces?

sql: SELECT state, COUNT(*) as campaign_count FROM customerio_data.campaign GROUP BY state ORDER BY campaign_count DESC
question: Break down our email campaigns by status

sql: SELECT type, COUNT(*) as count FROM customerio_data.campaign WHERE state = 'active' GROUP BY type
question: What types of active campaigns are we running?

sql: SELECT name, created FROM customerio_data.campaign ORDER BY created DESC LIMIT 10
question: What are our most recently launched campaigns?

sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created) as month, COUNT(*) as campaigns_launched FROM customerio_data.campaign WHERE created >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
question: How many campaigns have we launched each month?

sql: SELECT name, updated FROM customerio_data.campaign WHERE updated >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY updated DESC
question: Which campaigns were modified this week?

sql: SELECT type, state, COUNT(*) as count FROM customerio_data.campaign GROUP BY type, state ORDER BY count DESC
question: Show me campaign distribution by type and status

sql: SELECT name, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated - created)) / 86400 as days_active FROM customerio_data.campaign WHERE state = 'active' ORDER BY days_active DESC LIMIT 10
question: Which active campaigns have been running the longest?

sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as draft_campaigns FROM customerio_data.campaign WHERE state = 'draft'
question: How many draft campaigns do we have?

sql: SELECT EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM created) as quarter, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created) as year, COUNT(*) as campaigns FROM customerio_data.campaign GROUP BY year, quarter ORDER BY year DESC, quarter DESC LIMIT 4
question: Show me our quarterly campaign launch activity

sql: SELECT state, MIN(created) as first_campaign, MAX(created) as latest_campaign FROM customerio_data.campaign GROUP BY state
question: When were the first and latest campaigns created for each status?

sql: SELECT type, COUNT(*) as action_count FROM customerio_data.campaign_action GROUP BY type ORDER BY action_count DESC
question: What types of campaign actions do we use most?

sql: SELECT campaign_id, COUNT(*) as actions FROM customerio_data.campaign_action GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY actions DESC LIMIT 10
question: Which campaigns have the most actions configured?

sql: SELECT name, type FROM customerio_data.campaign_action ORDER BY created DESC LIMIT 10
question: What are our most recently added campaign actions?

sql: SELECT type, COUNT(DISTINCT campaign_id) as campaigns_using FROM customerio_data.campaign_action GROUP BY type ORDER BY campaigns_using DESC
question: Which action types are used across the most campaigns?

sql: SELECT campaign_id, COUNT(*) as action_count FROM customerio_data.campaign_action GROUP BY campaign_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY action_count DESC
question: Which campaigns have complex action sequences?

sql: SELECT AVG(action_count) as avg_actions_per_campaign FROM (SELECT campaign_id, COUNT(*) as action_count FROM customerio_data.campaign_action GROUP BY campaign_id) subquery
question: What's the average number of actions per campaign?

sql: SELECT type, COUNT(*) as count FROM customerio_data.campaign_action WHERE created >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '90 days' GROUP BY type ORDER BY count DESC
question: What types of actions have we been adding to campaigns recently?

sql: SELECT name, created FROM customerio_data.campaign_action WHERE type = 'email' ORDER BY created DESC LIMIT 10
question: What are our most recently configured email actions?

sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created) as month, COUNT(*) as actions_added FROM customerio_data.campaign_action WHERE created >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '6 months' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
question: How many campaign actions have we configured each month?

sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT campaign_id) as campaigns_with_actions FROM customerio_data.campaign_action
question: How many campaigns have actions configured?

sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', timestamp) as day, COUNT(*) as clicks FROM customerio_data.clicks WHERE timestamp >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
question: Show me our daily email click trends for the last month

sql: SELECT link_url, COUNT(*) as click_count FROM customerio_data.clicks WHERE timestamp >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY link_url ORDER BY click_count DESC LIMIT 10
question: What are the most clicked links in our emails?

sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT delivery_id) as emails_clicked FROM customerio_data.clicks WHERE timestamp >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days'
question: How many emails got clicks in the last 30 days?

sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', timestamp) as week, COUNT(*) as clicks FROM customerio_data.clicks WHERE timestamp >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '12 weeks' GROUP BY week ORDER BY week
question: What's our weekly email click trend?

sql: SELECT delivery_id, COUNT(*) as clicks FROM customerio_data.clicks GROUP BY delivery_id ORDER BY clicks DESC LIMIT 10
question: Which emails are getting the most engagement?

sql: SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) as hour, COUNT(*) as clicks FROM customerio_data.clicks WHERE timestamp >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour
question: When do people typically click links in our emails?

sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', timestamp) as month, COUNT(*) as clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT delivery_id) as emails_clicked FROM customerio_data.clicks WHERE timestamp >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '6 months' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
question: Show me monthly click activity and email engagement

sql: SELECT link_url, COUNT(DISTINCT delivery_id) as emails_with_link FROM customerio_data.clicks GROUP BY link_url ORDER BY emails_with_link DESC LIMIT 10
question: Which links appear in the most emails?

sql: SELECT AVG(clicks_per_email) as avg_clicks FROM (SELECT delivery_id, COUNT(*) as clicks_per_email FROM customerio_data.clicks GROUP BY delivery_id) subquery
question: What's the average number of clicks per email?

sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT delivery_id) as unique_emails, ROUND(COUNT(*)::numeric / COUNT(DISTINCT delivery_id), 2) as clicks_per_email FROM customerio_data.clicks WHERE timestamp >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days'
question: What's our overall email engagement rate for the last month?

sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as active_subscribers, SUM(CASE WHEN unsubscribed = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unsubscribed, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN unsubscribed = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) as unsubscribe_rate FROM customerio_data.customer
question: What's our subscriber base and unsubscribe rate?

sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', created_at) as week, COUNT(*) as new_subscribers FROM customerio_data.customer WHERE created_at >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '12 weeks' GROUP BY week ORDER BY week
question: Show me our weekly subscriber growth

sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as new_subscribers FROM customerio_data.customer WHERE created_at >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days' AND unsubscribed = false
question: How many new active subscribers did we add in the last 30 days?

sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) as month, COUNT(*) as subscribers_added FROM customerio_data.customer WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
question: What's our monthly subscriber acquisition trend?

sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as recently_updated FROM customerio_data.customer WHERE updated_at >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '7 days'
question: How many subscriber profiles were updated this week?

sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_subscribers, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days') as new_last_month, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '90 days') as new_last_quarter FROM customerio_data.customer WHERE unsubscribed = false
question: How is our subscriber base growing?

sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at) as year, COUNT(*) as subscribers_added FROM customerio_data.customer GROUP BY year ORDER BY year
question: How many subscribers have we added each year?

sql: SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (u.timestamp - c.created_at)) / 86400) as avg_days_subscribed FROM customerio_data.unsubscribes u JOIN customerio_data.customer c ON u.customer_id = c.id
question: How long do people typically stay subscribed before unsubscribing?

sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', created_at) as day, COUNT(*) as emails_sent FROM customerio_data.deliveries WHERE created_at >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
question: Show me our daily email send volume

sql: SELECT campaign_id, COUNT(*) as sends FROM customerio_data.deliveries WHERE created_at >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY campaign_id ORDER BY sends DESC LIMIT 10
question: Which campaigns are sending the most emails?

sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) as unique_recipients FROM customerio_data.deliveries WHERE created_at >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days'
question: How many unique people received emails in the last 30 days?

sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', created_at) as week, COUNT(*) as emails_sent FROM customerio_data.deliveries WHERE created_at >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '12 weeks' GROUP BY week ORDER BY week
question: What's our weekly email volume trend?

sql: SELECT newsletter_id, COUNT(*) as sends FROM customerio_data.deliveries WHERE newsletter_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY newsletter_id ORDER BY sends DESC LIMIT 10
question: Which newsletters have the highest send volume?

sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) as month, COUNT(*) as emails_sent, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) as unique_recipients FROM customerio_data.deliveries WHERE created_at >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '6 months' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
question: Show me monthly email sends and unique recipient counts

sql: SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM created_at) as hour, COUNT(*) as emails_sent FROM customerio_data.deliveries WHERE created_at >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour
question: What time of day do we typically send emails?

sql: SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) as emails_received FROM customerio_data.deliveries WHERE created_at >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY emails_received DESC LIMIT 10
question: Who is receiving the most emails from us?

sql: SELECT AVG(daily_volume) as avg_daily_sends FROM (SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', created_at) as day, COUNT(*) as daily_volume FROM customerio_data.deliveries WHERE created_at >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY day) subquery
question: What's our average daily email send volume?

sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as sends_this_month, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) as reach FROM customerio_data.deliveries WHERE created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('month', DATE '2024-12-31')
question: How many emails have we sent this month and to how many people?

sql: SELECT name, created FROM customerio_data.newsletter ORDER BY created DESC

sql: SELECT name, updated FROM customerio_data.newsletter ORDER BY updated DESC LIMIT 5

sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_newsletters FROM customerio_data.newsletter

sql: SELECT name FROM customerio_data.newsletter ORDER BY created DESC LIMIT 5

sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created) as month, COUNT(*) as newsletters_created FROM customerio_data.newsletter GROUP BY month ORDER BY month DESC
question: When have we launched new newsletters?

sql: SELECT name, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (updated - created)) / 86400 as days_active FROM customerio_data.newsletter ORDER BY days_active DESC
question: How long have our newsletters been running?

sql: SELECT name, created FROM customerio_data.newsletter WHERE created >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '90 days'
question: Which newsletters were launched in the last quarter?

sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created) as year, COUNT(*) as newsletters_launched FROM customerio_data.newsletter GROUP BY year ORDER BY year
question: How many newsletters have we launched each year?

sql: SELECT name FROM customerio_data.newsletter WHERE updated >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY updated DESC
question: Which newsletters have we modified recently?

sql: SELECT name, created FROM customerio_data.newsletter ORDER BY created ASC LIMIT 1
question: What was our first newsletter?

sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', timestamp) as day, COUNT(*) as opens FROM customerio_data.opens WHERE timestamp >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
question: Show me our daily email open trends

sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT delivery_id) as emails_opened FROM customerio_data.opens WHERE timestamp >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days'
question: How many emails were opened in the last 30 days?

sql: SELECT delivery_id, COUNT(*) as opens FROM customerio_data.opens GROUP BY delivery_id ORDER BY opens DESC LIMIT 10
question: Which emails are being opened the most?

sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', timestamp) as week, COUNT(*) as opens FROM customerio_data.opens WHERE timestamp >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '12 weeks' GROUP BY week ORDER BY week
question: What's our weekly email open trend?

sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', timestamp) as month, COUNT(*) as opens, COUNT(DISTINCT delivery_id) as emails_opened FROM customerio_data.opens WHERE timestamp >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '6 months' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
question: Show me monthly email open activity

sql: SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp) as hour, COUNT(*) as opens FROM customerio_data.opens WHERE timestamp >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour

sql: SELECT AVG(opens_per_email) as avg_opens FROM (SELECT delivery_id, COUNT(*) as opens_per_email FROM customerio_data.opens GROUP BY delivery_id) subquery

sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_opens, COUNT(DISTINCT delivery_id) as unique_emails, ROUND(COUNT(*)::numeric / COUNT(DISTINCT delivery_id), 2) as opens_per_email FROM customerio_data.opens WHERE timestamp >= DATE '2024-12-31' - INTERVAL '30 days'
question: What's our email open rate for the last month?

sql: SELECT delivery_id, COUNT(*) as reopen_count FROM customerio_data.opens GROUP BY delivery_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 2 ORDER BY reopen_count DESC LIMIT 10

sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT delivery_id) as emails_reported FROM customerio_data.spam_complaints

sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('quarter', timestamp) as quarter, COUNT(*) as complaints FROM customerio_data.spam_complaints GROUP BY quarter ORDER BY quarter DESC

sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT delivery_id) as emails_causing_unsubscribes FROM customerio_data.unsubscribes
